name: MoltFlow WhatsApp Agent
description:
Enterprise WhatsApp automation agent with group monitoring, lead extraction, bulk
  messaging, scheduled campaigns, AI-powered outreach, and end-to-end encrypted A2A
  communication. Supports anti-spam compliance, custom contact groups, webhook
  integrations, and MCP tool access for seamless agent-to-agent collaboration.
